claims.summary: Observed flattening must name what was compressed rather than ending at a generic status.
claims.disposition: implement additive schema V3 reasoning_for_flattening validation, projection, audits, command help, and regressions

claims.summary: The active thread should remain legible when pending acknowledgement, urgency, and heartbeat-only threads coexist.
claims.disposition: verify active_correspondence_thread_clarity_v1 selects one primary thread and bounded runner-up summaries

claims.summary: A held acknowledgement must not be manufactured from transport evidence or elapsed time.
claims.disposition: verify only being-authored ACK, reply, trace, or explicit outcome rows create semantic uptake evidence
